label: IT Auditor
description: Conducts independent assessments of IT controls, information security programs, and regulatory compliance — producing audit reports, working papers, and attestations.

paths.name: CISA Track
paths.rationale: CISA is the gold standard IT audit credential globally — listed as required in virtually every IT audit job posting.
pros: CISA is the most recognized IT audit credential globally
Required by name at Big 4, internal audit, and government IT audit
CIA adds internal audit methodology depth
cons: CISA requires 5 years IS audit/control/security experience
CIA is a 3-part exam series requiring significant study investment

prerequisites.experience: 5 years IT audit, control, or security experience required for CISA application. Pursue GRCP while accumulating experience.

cert_sequence.notes: OCEG GRC Professional — accessible entry credential covering GRC framework, policy management, and compliance program structure. Pursue while accumulating the work experience required for CISA.

ISACA Certified Information Systems Auditor — the gold standard. IS audit process, IT governance, information systems acquisition, IS operations, protection of information assets. Study with ISACA CISA Review Manual and Hemang Doshi question bank.
IIA Certified Internal Auditor — three-part exam. Adds internal audit methodology depth. CISA plus CIA is the most recognized combination for senior IT audit roles at large enterprises.

paths.name: ISO 27001 Audit Track
paths.rationale: For IT auditors specializing in ISO 27001 ISMS audits — conducting implementation assessments and formal certification audits.
pros: ISO 27001 LA widely recognized for ISMS certification audit work
Strong demand in European and Asia-Pacific markets
GSNA adds technical systems audit depth alongside governance credentials
cons: Less recognized than CISA for general IT audit in US market
ISO certification audit work requires accredited certification body affiliation

prerequisites.experience: IT or information security experience beneficial. Lower experience barriers than CISA.

cert_sequence.notes: ISO 27001 Foundation — quick overview of the standard structure. Often bundled with Lead Implementer training from the same provider.

ISO 27001 Lead Auditor — audit planning, execution, reporting, and follow-up per ISO 19011. Requires 5-day training from an accredited PECB provider. Primary credential for conducting formal ISMS certification audits.

GIAC Systems and Network Auditor — adds technical systems and network audit depth. DoD 8140 approved. With ISO 27001 LA providing governance framework, GSNA adds the technical review capability ISO 27001 governance auditors often lack.
